name: Earth Restoration

VINIT.justification: uninitialized pre-restoration state before any intervention

TANCH.justification: closed boundary containing the entire restoration system

AFWD.justification: directed forward transformation toward restored state

AREV.justification: reverse descent from degraded to baseline conditions

IMSCRIB.justification: identity of the land knowing its restored form

FSPLIT.justification: splits into active restoration branch and passive recovery branch

FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the original degraded input exactly via combined branches

EVALF.justification: negative failure state of insufficient intervention

ENGAGR.justification: both warming and cooling effects held simultaneously without resolution

IFIX.justification: append-only irreversible measurement of carbon sequestration

phase_3.void_description: barren pre-intervention wasteland with no named processes
phase_3.true_description: successful restoration yielding thriving biodiversity and stable carbon
phase_3.false_description: failure leaving continued erosion and biodiversity loss
phase_3.both_description: albedo-carbon paradox held unresolved during transitional phases

steps.domain_action: barren wasteland exists as uninitialized state
degraded ecosystem branches into active restoration and passive recovery
thriving biodiversity affirms active restoration arm
continued degradation marks the passive recovery arm
restored ecosystem reconstitutes the original degraded input
watershed chaining composes sequential restoration steps
permanent soil record appends irreversible carbon data
planetary biosphere seals the completed restoration

phase_5.compiler_frontend: ecological modeling translates restoration goals into sequenced interventions
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: nutrient cycles and species migration exchange signals between patches
phase_5.memory_mechanism: soil strata and seed banks store and retrieve historical states
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: seasonal cycles and rainfall events determine operation timing
phase_5.alfs_store: global seed vault and baseline biodiversity surveys serve as canonical reference

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — solar input offsets entropy produced by restoration work

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → FSPLIT → EVALT → AFWD → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → CLINK → IMSCRIB → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Earth Restoration
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,2,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=False | period=11
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(1, 6)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑚  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [2] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [5] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [6] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [7] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence
--   [8] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑱 → 𐑭  | identity — self-imscription
--   [9] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑠 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [10] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def earth_restoration_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (barren wasteland exists as uninitialized state)
  -- FSPLIT [1] (gran := 𐑚) (degraded ecosystem branches into active restoration and passive recovery) / FFUSE [6] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [2] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (thriving biodiversity affirms active restoration arm)
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (reforestation growth advances the T-arm)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (continued degradation marks the passive recovery arm)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (erosion reversal descends the F-arm))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [6]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [6] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (restored ecosystem reconstitutes the original degraded input)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [7] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (watershed chaining composes sequential restoration steps)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [8] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (ecosystem self-recognition affirms restored identity)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑡)  -- [9] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (permanent soil record appends irreversible carbon data)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [10] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (planetary biosphere seals the completed restoration)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def earth_restoration_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (earth_restoration_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def earth_restoration_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (earth_restoration_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem earth_restoration_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
